thesis.statement: The revised look stays intimate, but the palette is colder and the camera feels more withheld.
principles: Make emotional access feel earned rather than immediate.

palette.description: Cold blue-gray carries distance while small warm accents mark fragile trust.

observations.text: Warmth should appear only when a character risks honesty.

toneMood.description: Lower saturation and softer contrast keep the image emotionally guarded.

composition.description: Frames hold more distance and isolate characters with architecture.

patterns.name: Separated planes
patterns.description: Use foreground and background distance to show hesitation.

lighting.description: Soft daylight and cool ambience dominate, with warmth kept rare.

patterns.name: Late warmth
patterns.description: Introduce warm practicals only after trust has been earned.

texture.description: Matte surfaces, cool air, and quiet fabric replace gloss.

observations.text: Texture should feel dry, restrained, and lived-in.

camera.description: The camera observes from a respectful distance.

movement.name: Delayed approach
movement.description: Move closer only after a scene commits emotionally.
